name: Piquant Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 inch piece ginger root, peeled, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a saucepan.
2. Add 1 clove of crushed garlic, ginger, and popping corn.
3. Stir well. Cover and cook over medium-high heat for 3-5 minutes, holding the lid firmly and shaking the pan frequently until popping stops.
4. Turn the popped corn onto a dish, discarding any unpopped corn kernels.
5. Melt the butter in the pan.
6. Stir in the remaining clove of crushed garlic and chili sauce.
7. Return the corn to the pan and toss well until evenly coated with the mixture.
8. Add parsley and salt, then stir well.
9. Turn into a serving dish. Serve warm or cold.
